Bash(python -c "
import requests
import base64
from PIL import ImageGrab
import io

# Quick test - capture screen and send to model
print\(''Capturing screen...''\)
screenshot = ImageGrab.grab\(\)
buffer = io.BytesIO\(\)
screenshot.save\(buffer, format=''PNG''\)
img_b64 = base64.b64encode\(buffer.getvalue\(\)\).decode\(\)

print\(f''Image captured: {len\(img_b64\)} chars''\)

# Send to UI-TARS
print\(''Sending to UI-TARS...''\)
payload = {
    ''model'': ''0000/ui-tars-1.5-7b-q8_0:q8'',
    ''prompt'': ''What do you see on this screen? Describe briefly.'',
    ''images'': [img_b64],
    ''stream'': False,
    ''options'': {''temperature'': 0.1, ''num_predict'': 200}
}

r = requests.post\(''http://localhost:11434/api/generate'', json=payload, timeout=120\)
print\(f''Status: {r.status_code}''\)
if r.ok:
    print\(f''Response: {r.json\(\)[""response""][:500]}''\)
else:
    print\(f''Error: {r.text}''\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import requests
import base64
from PIL import ImageGrab
import io

print\(''Capturing screen...''\)
screenshot = ImageGrab.grab\(\)
buffer = io.BytesIO\(\)
screenshot.save\(buffer, format=''PNG''\)
img_b64 = base64.b64encode\(buffer.getvalue\(\)\).decode\(\)
print\(f''Image: {len\(img_b64\)} chars''\)

print\(''Sending to qwen3-vl:30b...''\)
payload = {
    ''model'': ''qwen3-vl:30b'',
    ''prompt'': ''What do you see on this screen? Describe briefly in 2-3 sentences.'',
    ''images'': [img_b64],
    ''stream'': False,
    ''options'': {''temperature'': 0.1, ''num_predict'': 150}
}

r = requests.post\(''http://localhost:11434/api/generate'', json=payload, timeout=180\)
print\(f''Status: {r.status_code}''\)
if r.ok:
    data = r.json\(\)
    print\(f''Response: {data.get\(""response"", """"\)}''\)
    if ''thinking'' in data:
        print\(f''Thinking: {data[""thinking""][:200]}...''\)
else:
    print\(f''Error: {r.text}''\)
")
